description: Dashboard for GCP CloudSQL for PostgreSQL monitoring overview
title: GCP CloudSQL for PostgreSQL Overview

widgets.description: Current CPU utilization of the reserved CPU that is currently in use

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: CPU utilization

widgets.description: The fraction of the memory quota that is currently in use

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: Memory utilization

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'
project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.description: Number of connections to the Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: PostgreSQL Connections

widgets.description: Number of connections to the Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance, grouped by its state.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: Cloud SQL Connections

widgets.description: Delta count of number of transactions.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: Number of transactions

widgets.description: Total number of lock requests that resulted in a deadlock.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: Deadlocks

widgets.description: Age of the oldest transaction yet to be vacuumed in the Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance, measured in number of transactions that have happened since the oldest transaction

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND database_id in $database_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database'

widgets.title: Oldest transaction age

widgets.description: Accumulated query execution time per user per database.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_instance_database' AND resource_id IN $database_id

widgets.title: Aggregate execution time

widgets.description: Accumulated IO time per user per database. Count is microsecond.
widgets.title: IO Execution Time

widgets.description: Indicates if the server is up or not.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database' AND database_id IN $database_id

widgets.title: Server Up

widgets.description:
Rate of change per query execution accumulated time. It shows top 10 results per time series.
Count is in microsecond.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_instance_database' AND resource_id IN $database_id

widgets.title: Query Execution Time

widgets.description: Replication lag in bytes. Reported from the master per replica.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'cloudsql_database' AND database_id IN $database_id

widgets.title: Replication Lag
